description_long: This is a suburban house surrounded by a variety of mature trees and greenery, set on a corner lot with an L-shaped road and driveway. The house features a combination of gable and hip roofs, with multiple rooflines and dormer windows adding architectural interest. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding, with darker roofing materials and several visible chimneys. There is a prominent attached garage on one side, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps leading up to the front door. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of standard and larger picture windows, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is well-maintained, with trees strategically placed around the property for privacy and curb appeal.
description: A light-colored, multi-story suburban house with gable and hip roofs, surrounded by mature trees and an L-shaped driveway. Features include an attached garage, asymmetrical windows, and a small front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, and a variety of trees lining the driveway and property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, more trees, and the L-shaped road wrapping around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional rooflines, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, garage, and a clear view of the roof structure and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single front door, accented by minimal decorative elements.
